Describe the sequence of visual elements and phone positions shown from the beginning to the end of the clip.
canonical_answer: At 0s, the Android Authority logo appears with a green flare; at 4s, a gold smartphone lies on a white table displaying a lightsaber wallpaper; at 10s, the screen graphic shifts to a blue and green light beam; at 16s, the phone stands upright revealing the rear camera and Huawei logo.
